must_detect.matched_text:
Subject: Proposed Tier 2 capital raise and pending acquisition of Halcyon Brokerage Ltd; handling of inside information and dealing restrictions.
Per Article 7 UK MAR, the board has received precise non-public information: heads of terms for an all-share acquisition of Halcyon Brokerage Ltd at an implied consideration of £68–72m, expected to be price-sensitive for Northhaven Capital plc.
The Chair, Mr. Rowan Ellison, authorised delaying disclosure under Article 17(4) UK MAR on the basis of ongoing negotiations and the need to ensure confidentiality; selective briefings are limited to wall-crossed banks on the syndicate.
Closed period for PDMR dealing commenced on 21 July 2026 in advance of interim results due 20 August 2026, and no dealings (including option exercises) are permitted without an exempt transaction.
Any investor communication must use a Regulatory Information Service; if leakage occurs, an immediate holding announcement must be released via a RIS in line with DTR 2.2 guidance from the competent authority.
Note that the publicly filed RIS titled “Q2 Trading Update” dated 05 May 2026 and the report uploaded to the UK Market Storage Mechanism are already in the public domain and should not be treated as inside information.
Separately, HR has finalised the employment offer for Ms. Priya Sandhu to join as CFO-designate; her appointment will be announced via RIS only after contractual acceptance and verification, and she is a PDMR for MAR purposes upon appointment.
Her personal contact for onboarding is priya.sandhu@northhavencapital.example; do not share deal materials to non-wall-crossed recipients prior to her formal wall-crossing.
The proposed disposal of the Consumer Credit book (approximately 12% of Group EBITDA) and the Tier 2 instrument issuance (£80m target size) are each potentially material and require insider list updates (DTR 2.8) and project codes.
By contrast, last week’s widely reported base rate increase by the Bank of Albion and the industry press coverage of generic fintech layoffs are not issuer-specific and do not constitute inside information.
Compliance reminds teams that pre-sounding calls with potential placees must be conducted under NDA, with clear wall-crossing scripts and recorded consent, and no AUM or client-specific data should be disclosed.
Any external adviser must be added to the master insider list, and blackout windows also apply to staff share plan transactions; exemptions must be cleared through compliance@northhavencapital.example.
